summary: WebSocket implementation testing complete. All 14 tests passed. WebSocket endpoints (/ws/priorities, /ws/states/{asset_id}, /ws/outcomes) working correctly via localhost:8001. HTTP status endpoint (/api/system/ws/status) working via external URL. Lens compliance verified - payloads use confidence_label instead of raw scores.
critical_code_review_comments: WebSocket implementation is well-structured with ConnectionManager handling connections per channel
Event backbone integration works - db.create_event() triggers broadcasts via broadcaster.py
Lens compliance is properly enforced - payloads use confidence_label (strong/moderate/weak/unknown) instead of raw numeric scores
Resync behavior on connect provides current state snapshot for client recovery
Heartbeat mechanism (30 second interval) keeps connections alive
All existing endpoints (priorities, escalation, health) continue to work correctly
seed_data_creation: Tests use reset + seed + simulate-drift pattern to create test data reliably
context_for_next_testing_agent: WebSocket tests created in /app/backend/tests/test_websocket_implementation.py. All 14 tests pass. WebSocket connections must use localhost:8001 (ws://localhost:8001/ws/...) as external ingress may not support WebSocket upgrade. HTTP endpoints work via external URL.

endpoints_tested: GET /api/system/ws/status - Returns connection count and available channels
WS /ws/priorities - Connects, sends resync with current priorities, heartbeats every 30s
WS /ws/states/{asset_id} - Connects, sends resync with current states for asset, handles invalid asset
verified_behaviors: Resync on connect provides current state snapshot
Heartbeat sent every 30 seconds to keep connection alive
Invalid asset_id returns error message and closes connection
Payloads are lens-compliant (confidence_label instead of raw confidence)
Event backbone integration - events trigger broadcasts

lens_compliance.details: Payloads use confidence_label (strong/moderate/weak/unknown) instead of raw numeric confidence scores. No priority_score, score_components, severity_score, severity_components, or confidence_components exposed in WebSocket payloads.

notes.websocket_access: WebSocket connections work via localhost:8001 (ws://localhost:8001/ws/...). External URL (wss://...) may have ingress limitations for WebSocket upgrade.
notes.heartbeat_test: Heartbeat test took ~40 seconds as expected (30 second interval + connection setup)
